title: Avanti Master PRO FINAL
author: avantistocks
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Avanti Master PRO FINAL by avantistocks.
Avanti Master PRO is an advanced smart-money inspired intraday trading system designed to help traders identify high-probability trend and breakout opportunities.

This indicator combines trend analysis, momentum confirmation, volume buildup interpretation, and breakout probability scoring to provide structured trade signals along with dynamic risk-reward levels.
